codeReview.summary: The implementation in web/src/pages/er.astro covers the feature requirements: clicking an entity opens a detail panel; the panel shows entity name/description, attributes with types, incoming and outgoing relationships, related constraints, and traceability links with an empty state; and dismissal works via close button, backdrop click, and Escape key.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The astro-frontend skill's "Write Vitest tests (RED)" step did not fit this SVG + Alpine interaction feature; validation relied on agent-browser checks instead.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback.suggestedChanges explicitly calls out Vitest impracticality for this case, and transcript skeleton shows browser-driven verification with no new frontend test files.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mermaid ER implementation quirks (entity group id pattern and enum type sanitization requirements) were discovered during work but are not captured in shared library knowledge.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton shows debugging ids like "er-diagram-...-entity-User-0" and parse failures for enum(...) types before fixes in web/src/pages/er.astro (attachEntityClickHandlers and sanitizeType).

summary: Reviewed feature entity-explorer via features.json entry, handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit b70f365 diff. Requirements are satisfied and no blocking or non-blocking implementation defects were found in scope.
